goal: Encode Verra forestry methodology support so methodology-linked reviews can be consumed by app.article6 after encoding, starting with VM0007 and leaving room for later Verra forestry methods.
notes: VF1 source PDF provenance is verified for VM0007 v1.8.
Existing VM0007 sections and rules are retained as draft seed artifacts pending VF2/VF3 audit against the verified source PDF.
VM0007 remains not ready for methodology-linked review while those artifacts stay draft_unverified.
VM0007 is the first methodology adopting the repo-wide review_contract_v1 artifact quality standard.

phases.name: Expand to modern Verra forestry methods
